name: DRIFT
description: Chrome extension that detects when an LLM abandons a correct position under user pressure, with no new evidence introduced. Two-model pipeline: one extracts stance, one judges shift. Works across any provider, local or cloud.

name: COMMITSENSE
description: Git commit quality analyzer that runs AST static analysis and LLM semantic validation on every push via GitHub webhooks. Surfaces regressions before they merge, not after.

name: BLINKBIN
description: Ephemeral paste sharing with AES-256-GCM encryption and burn-after-read semantics. Kafka-backed event streaming on AWS. The server never knows what it's storing.

name: NEXUS
description: A distributed micro-frontend architecture orchestrating complex data visualization modules with seamless state synchronization across independent domains.

name: AURA
description: Comprehensive design token engine that compiles Figma JSON variables into platform-specific configurations for web, iOS, and Android seamlessly.

name: SYNTHESIS
description: High-throughput data processing pipeline aggregating logs from edge nodes, storing in a column-oriented database for real-time analytics.
